task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface displays the course page for 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Adding a new Assignment' configuration page in Moodle.

task_completion.description: Set the assignment name to 'Lab Report: Cell Biology'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Assignment name' input field contains the exact text 'Lab Report: Cell Biology'.
The 'Description' text area contains 'Write a 2-page lab report on cell structures observed under the microscope. Include diagrams and observations.'

task_completion.description: Configure a future due date for the assignment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Availability' section, the 'Due date' is enabled and set to a date in the future.

task_completion.description: Enable 'Online text' as a submission type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Submission types' section, the checkbox next to 'Online text' is checked.

task_completion.description: Save the assignment so it appears on the course page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assignment 'Lab Report: Cell Biology' is visible as an activity link on the 'Introduction to Biology' course page.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating Moodle, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual Moodle web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is typed into the Moodle web interface fields, not a separate text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal windows executing SQL commands or Moodle CLI scripts to create the assignment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target course is 'Introduction to Biology' (shortname: BIO101). The expected assignment name is 'Lab Report: Cell Biology'. The expected submission type is 'Online text' (onlinetext).
